title: AddressPart enum is correctly pub(crate), not pub
description: AddressPart in message.rs is pub(crate). It is an internal coordination type between the message module and the evaluator. The public API is compile()/evaluate()/SieveAction/SieveError. A reviewer might suggest making it pub, but that would leak an internal enum and create a compatibility obligation. The pub(crate) visibility is correct and intentional.
